Chief Trader & Market Strategist

Petra Freddi

12 Years of Elite Trading — Forex | Stocks | Crypto | Commodities

Petra Freddi is a world-class chief trader with over 12 years of hands-on experience navigating global financial markets. Specializing in Forex, cryptocurrency, stocks, and commodities, she has built a reputation for consistent profitability and precision market analysis across volatile market conditions.

Having traded at top-tier financial institutions including Goldman Sachs and Apollo Management, Petra brings institutional-grade strategies to retail traders worldwide. She has personally mentored over 5,000 traders, helping them achieve financial independence through disciplined, data-driven trading.

Her expertise spans technical analysis, algorithmic trading, risk management, and macroeconomic research. A global citizen fluent in six languages, Petra has traded across markets in London, Singapore, Hong Kong, New York, and Dubai.
